scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.package:desktop:win: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build:win -w apps/desktop
scripts.package:desktop:linux: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build:linux -w apps/desktop
scripts.package:desktop:mac: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build:mac -w apps/desktop
